ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the member */,
  "secondary_email" TEXT /* Secondary email address of the member */,
  "office_number" INTEGER /* Office number of the member */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the member's information was last modified */,
  "member_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member type (e.g., individual, company, non-member) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the member (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the association */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the membership was last renewed */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the member's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_member_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_type_id") REFERENCES member_types ("member_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_types" (
  "member_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member type */,
  "member_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the member type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the member type */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual membership fee for this member type */,
  "max_representatives" INTEGER /* Maximum number of representatives allowed for company members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member who owns the office */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the office address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the office address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the office is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the office */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "office_email" TEXT /* Email address specific to the office */,
  "office_manager" TEXT /* Name of the office manager */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., headquarters, branch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directories" (
  "directory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory listing */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member listed in the directory */,
  "directory_name" TEXT /* Name of the directory listing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the directory listing */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the directory listing */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the member's website */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the directory listing (e.g., based on user reviews) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directory_categories" (
  "directory_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory category */,
  "directory_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the directory category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the directory category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directory_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directory_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES directory_categories ("directory_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directory_listings" (
  "directory_listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory listing association */,
  "directory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory listing */,
  "directory_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory category */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the listing (e.g., for featured listings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directory_listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directory_listings_directory_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("directory_category_id") REFERENCES directory_categories ("directory_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directory_listings_directory_id FOREIGN KEY ("directory_id") REFERENCES directories ("directory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions_json" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that has this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_profile_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member whose profile was visited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who visited the profile */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_profile_visits_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_profile_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directory_listings_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "directory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory listing that was visited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who visited the listing */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directory_listings_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directory_listings_visits_directory_id FOREIGN KEY ("directory_id") REFERENCES directories ("directory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sender of the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the recipient */,
  "is_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID provided by the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment that generated this response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message from the payment gateway */,
  "is_retryable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the payment failure is retryable */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the payment has been retried */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_responses_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payment_gateway ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., membership statistics, directory analytics) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
